arts.ttl: Managing Madrid Podcast: Atletico Madrid vs Real Madrid Preview, 2nd Leg, Champions League 2024 - 2025
arts.sum: On this Members-only episode of the Managing Madrid Podcast, Kiyan Sobhani and Jeremy Beren of Into The Calderon discuss: It also serves as a means for Real Madrid fans to connect and discuss the team.

arts.ttl: Atlético vs Real Madrid: Champions League second leg times, how to watch on TV and stream in the U.S.
arts.sum: Real Madrid will take a narrow lead into the second leg of their Champions League round-of-16 tie with Atlético Madrid, as the holders bid to eliminate their city rivals from Europe’s premier club tournament once again. Viewers in the United States can watch Atlético Madrid vs Real Madrid live in English on Paramount+, while Spanish-language coverage will be available on UniMás, TUDN and ViX.

arts.ttl: Photo: Real Madrid star left bloodied after heavy challenges vs Rayo Vallecano
arts.sum: A leading member of the attacking ranks at La Liga giants Real Madrid was left battered and bruised during the club’s most recent outing. Real Madrid were of course back…
